codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the three theme presets, CSS-variable switching, premium typography/surface styling, and a polished loading experience, but it does not fully satisfy the task: the requested game-over overlay was not implemented, and engine-init failures would be trapped behind the loading overlay.

issues.description: The task description explicitly called for premium styling on the game-over overlay, but the game-over state is still rendered as an inline `resultBanner` before the board instead of an overlay on top of it. There is no overlay implementation here, so this part of the requested polish is still missing.

`showLoadingScreen` depends only on `isReady`/`loadingDismissed`, so if worker initialization fails and `engineError` is set while `isReady` stays false, the loading overlay at lines 249-289 never clears and the error panel at lines 548-553 remains hidden behind it. Users would be stuck on a perpetual loading screen instead of seeing the failure state.

summary: Fail. The theme/polish work is mostly solid, but the feature is incomplete because it still uses a banner for game-over state instead of the requested overlay; additionally, engine-init failures would be masked by the loading overlay.
